title: Senior Plant Manager at ITC Limited

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at ITC Limited
jsonLd.description:
ITC Limited has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ITC Limited:
ITC Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited!
